description: DarkFactory action and merge gates. Rules are loaded by df-work, df-orchestrate, and df-follow-through before dispatch or merge actions.

rules.description: Worker PRs may merge only when all required checks are reported and successful.
DarkFactory creates fresh worker branches and never force-pushes them.
DarkFactory must not use admin bypass or direct protected-branch bypass to merge PRs.
Known runtime secrets must be redacted from errors, logs, comments, and ledgers.
Repositories parked in the managed lifecycle registry are skipped.
Worker branches target dev where the repository model provides it; repositories without dev may use their default branch.
